title: AI Audit Trail
description: A structured, cryptographically signed audit trail linking an AI system's certified artifacts to its tamper-evident decision records. Satisfies EU AI Act Articles 12 and 19 audit trail requirements.

audit_trail_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit trail export.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this audit trail was generated.

period.description: Time range covered by this audit trail.

system_id.description: Identifier of the AI system that generated these records.

operator_id.description: Deployer or operator responsible for this AI system.

model_version.description: Model version active during the audit period.

policy_version.description: Policy or rule set version active during the audit period.

artifact_certificate_id.description: Certificate ID of the primary artifact (e.g., certified training dataset) associated with this system.

artifact_certificate_url.description: Verification URL for the artifact certificate.

total_decisions.description: Total number of decision records in this audit trail.

decisions.description: Ordered sequence of decision records forming the tamper-evident chain.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision event.

decision_output.description: The output, classification, or recommendation produced.

human_oversight_flag.description: Whether a human reviewed or confirmed this decision.

why.description: Human-readable rationale summary. May be sterilized for public export.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 of this record's canonical content.

previous_hash.description: Hash of the prior record. Null for the first record in the chain.

first_record_hash.description: Hash of the first record in the chain.

last_record_hash.description: Hash of the last record in the chain.

chain_verified.description: Whether the full hash chain has been verified at export time.

integrity.description: Cryptographic integrity proof over the full audit trail.

signature_algorithm.description: Algorithm used to sign the audit trail.

public_key_url.description: URL of the signing key used. Enables independent verification.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical audit trail body.
